name: imovo-voucher-api

scripts.package: pnpm build && cd target && zip -qr imovo-voucher-api.zip ./*.js.map ./*.js
scripts.buildcheck:all: pnpm --filter email buildcheck && pnpm --filter aws buildcheck && pnpm --filter logger buildcheck && pnpm --filter imovo-voucher-api buildcheck && pnpm buildcheck
scripts.type-check:all: pnpm --filter email type-check && pnpm --filter aws type-check && pnpm --filter logger type-check && pnpm --filter imovo-voucher-api type-check && pnpm type-check
scripts.lint:all: pnpm --filter email lint && pnpm --filter aws lint && pnpm --filter logger lint && pnpm --filter imovo-voucher-api lint && pnpm lint
scripts.check-formatting:all: pnpm --filter email check-formatting && pnpm --filter aws check-formatting && pnpm --filter logger check-formatting && pnpm --filter imovo-voucher-api check-formatting && pnpm check-formatting
scripts.test:all: pnpm --filter email test && pnpm --filter aws test && pnpm --filter logger test && pnpm --filter imovo-voucher-api test && pnpm test

NOTICE1: MANAGED FILE: to push changes see buildcheck/README.md - template: buildcheck/data/templates/handler/package.json.ts
NOTICE2: all dependencies are defined in buildcheck/data/build.ts
